title: phlegmariurus sellifolius
intro: Phlegmariurus sellifolius, also known as the varnish club moss, is a species of club moss in the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus sellifolius include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used to make tea or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
